task_description: Refactor the tunnel system in src/lib/tunnel/ to remove excessive indirection layers, dead wrapper files, and the new Function hack. Flatten from 6 layers to 2-3 layers. Remove ALL turbopackIgnore inline comments from source code and use native Turbopack config instead.

verification.summary: npm run build completes with 0 NFT warnings. npx tsc --noEmit passes. Zero turbopackIgnore in source, zero new Function hacks. 12 dead files removed. Tunnel system flattened from 6 layers to 2-3.
